case_title: RODNEY HAUGE VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAREN BREWER--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUGE, RODNEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
